channel.title: SPL - Capitol Hill Branch
channel.description: Upcoming events for SPL - Capitol Hill Branch

item.title: Minority Veterans of America
item.description:
Tuesday, March 17, 2026 at 12 PM

Location: Capitol Hill Branch

Minority Veterans of America staff will be here to connect veterans to supportive services that are available throughout King County.

Event details

item.title: Queer Movie Club
item.description:
Wednesday, March 18, 2026 at 5 PM

Location: Capitol Hill Branch, Meeting Room

Join us for an LGBTQ+ film and discussion.

Event details

item.title: Family Story Time
item.description:
Friday, March 20, 2026 at 10:30 AM

Location: Capitol Hill Branch

At storytime, kids ages 0-5 and their families can enjoy stories, songs, and fun learning activities. 

Event details

item.title: Brick Buddies
item.description:
Saturday, March 21, 2026 at 10:30 AM

Location: Capitol Hill Branch, Meeting Room

Young children and their families are invited to join our drop-in play group with Lego bricks, Picasso tiles, and other building sets.

Event details

item.title: BMO Bank Financial Progress Presentation
item.description:
Wednesday, March 25, 2026 at 12 PM

Location: Capitol Hill Branch

Learn how to build your financial knowledge, develop healthy money habits, and strengthen your banking relationship. 

Event details
